20.CPUдёәд»Җд№ҲйҮҮз”Ёдёүзә§зј“еӯҳ 1800/01/01 19.CPUдёәд»Җд№ҲйңҖиҰҒзј“еӯҳ 1800/01/01 18.еҶ…еӯҳе’Ңзј“еӯҳзҡ„е…ізі» 1800/01/01 17.ж“ҚдҪңзі»з»ҹзҡ„з”ЁжҲ·жҖҒеҶ…ж ёжҖҒ 1800/01/01 16.зәҝзЁӢйҳ»еЎһеҺҹеӣ  1800/01/01 15.иҝӣзЁӢзәҝзЁӢе’ҢеҚҸзЁӢзҡ„еҢәеҲ« 1800/01/01 14.еӨ§з«Ҝе’Ңе°Ҹз«Ҝзҡ„еҢәеҲ« 1800/01/01 13.жӯ»й”Ғзҡ„еҗ«д№ү 1800/01/01 12.еҶ…еӯҳзўҺзүҮзҡ„е®ҡд№үеҸҠйҒҝе…Қ 1800/01/01 11.еҶ…еӯҳеҜ№йҪҗзҡ„е®ҡд№үеҸҠдҪңз”Ё 1800/01/01 10.д»Јз Ғж··ж·Ҷзҡ„еҗ«д№үеҸҠдҪңз”Ё 1800/01/01 28.ж•°жҚ®з»“жһ„зү№зӮ№е’ҢйҖӮз”ЁеңәжҷҜ 1800/01/01 27.иҮӘж—Ӣй”Ғе’Ңдә’ж–Ҙй”Ғзҡ„жң¬иҙЁеҢәеҲ« 1800/01/01 26.ж•°з»„йҒҚеҺҶжҜ”й“ҫиЎЁеҝ«зҡ„еҺҹеӣ  1800/01/01 25.зЁӢеәҸи®ҫи®ЎеҰӮдҪ•жҸҗй«ҳзј“еӯҳе‘ҪдёӯзҺҮ 1800/01/01 24.зј“еӯҳе‘ҪдёӯеҪұе“ҚCPUж•ҲзҺҮ 1800/01/01 23.ж Ҳеё§жҳҜд»Җд№Ҳ 1800/01/01 9.ејӮжҲ–еҠ еҜҶеҺҹзҗҶ 1800/01/01 8.зј–еҶҷйҖ’еҪ’еҮҪж•°ж—¶зҡ„е…ій”®жіЁж„ҸдәӢйЎ№ 1800/01/01 7.д»Җд№ҲжҳҜйҖ’еҪ’еҮҪж•° 1800/01/01 6.дёҚеҗҢеҗҺзјҖж–Үд»¶зҡ„жң¬иҙЁ 1800/01/01 5.CPUе’ҢGPUзҡ„дҪңз”Ё 1800/01/01 4.еӣһи°ғеҮҪж•°зҡ„е®ҡд№үе’ҢдҪҝз”Ё 1800/01/01 3.еҗҢжӯҘж–№жі•е’ҢејӮжӯҘж–№жі•зҡ„еҢәеҲ«еҸҠж„Ҹд№ү 1800/01/01 2.еҶ…еӯҳдёӯе Ҷе’Ңж Ҳзҡ„еҢәеҲ« 1800/01/01 1.ж•°з»„е’Ңй“ҫиЎЁзҡ„еҢәеҲ«жҳҜд»Җд№Ҳ 1800/01/01
    <
    >

    8.YooAsset+HybridCLRд»Јз Ғзғӯжӣҙж–°е®һи·ө

    иө„жәҗз®ЎзҗҶ > Unityиө„жәҗз®ЎзҗҶ > YooAsset иө„жәҗз®ЎзҗҶ Unityиө„жәҗз®ЎзҗҶ YooAsset
    еҸ‘еёғж—¶й—ҙ : 2025-03-27 13:04
    еӯ—ж•°:2.7k йҳ…иҜ» :
    иҜ„и®ә:
    1. 8.YooAssetз»“еҗҲHybridCLRд»Јз Ғзғӯжӣҙж–°е®һи·ө
      1. 8.1 зҹҘиҜҶзӮ№
        1. е®үиЈ…HybridCLR
          1. е®үиЈ…IL2CPP
          2. е®үиЈ… com.code-philosophy.hybridclr еҢ…
          3. еҲқе§ӢеҢ– com.code-philosophy.hybridclr
        2. еҲқе§ӢеҢ–Unityзғӯжӣҙж–°йЎ№зӣ®
          1. еҲӣе»әConsoleToScreen.csи„ҡжң¬
          2. mainеңәжҷҜеҲӣе»әConsoleToScreenз©әеҜ№иұЎжҢӮдёҠConsoleToScreenи„ҡжң¬
          3. еҲӣе»ә HotUpdate зғӯжӣҙж–°жЁЎеқ—
        3. й…ҚзҪ®HybridCLR
        4. еҲӣе»әзғӯжӣҙж–°и„ҡжң¬
        5. еҠ иҪҪзғӯжӣҙж–°зЁӢеәҸйӣҶ
        6. жү“еҢ…з”ҹжҲҗHotUpdate.dll
        7. жү“еҢ…иҝҗиЎҢ
        8. жөӢиҜ•зғӯжӣҙж–°
      2. 8.2 зҹҘиҜҶзӮ№д»Јз Ғ
        1. ConsoleToScreen.cs
        2. LoadDll.cs
        3. Hello.cs
        4. MyYooAssetTest.cs

    8.YooAssetз»“еҗҲHybridCLRд»Јз Ғзғӯжӣҙж–°е®һи·ө

    8.1 зҹҘиҜҶзӮ№

    е®үиЈ…HybridCLR

    е®үиЈ…IL2CPP

    ж №жҚ®ж“ҚдҪңзі»з»ҹпјҢе®үиЈ…иҝҮзЁӢдёӯйҖүжӢ©жЁЎеқ—ж—¶пјҢеҝ…йЎ»йҖүдёӯ Windows Build Support(IL2CPP)жҲ–Mac Build Support(IL2CPP)гҖӮ

    е®үиЈ… com.code-philosophy.hybridclr еҢ…

    дё»иҸңеҚ•дёӯзӮ№еҮ» Window вҶ’ Package Manager жү“ејҖеҢ…з®ЎзҗҶеҷЁгҖӮеҰӮдёӢеӣҫжүҖзӨәзӮ№еҮ»Add package from git URLвҖҰпјҢеЎ«е…Ҙ[https://gitee.com/focus-creative-games/hybridclr_unity.git]жҲ–[https://github.com/focus-creative-games/hybridclr_unity.git]гҖӮ


    еҲқе§ӢеҢ– com.code-philosophy.hybridclr

    жү“ејҖиҸңеҚ• HybridCLR вҶ’ InstallerвҖҰпјҢзӮ№еҮ»е®үиЈ…жҢүй’®иҝӣиЎҢе®үиЈ…гҖӮиҖҗеҝғзӯүеҫ…зәҰ 30sпјҢе®үиЈ…е®ҢжҲҗеҗҺжҺ§еҲ¶еҸ°дјҡжү“еҚ°е®үиЈ…жҲҗеҠҹж—Ҙеҝ—гҖӮ

    еҲқе§ӢеҢ–Unityзғӯжӣҙж–°йЎ№зӣ®

    еҲӣе»әConsoleToScreen.csи„ҡжң¬

    иҝҷдёӘи„ҡжң¬еҜ№дәҺжј”зӨәзғӯжӣҙж–°жІЎжңүзӣҙжҺҘдҪңз”ЁгҖӮе®ғеҸҜд»Ҙжү“еҚ°ж—Ҙеҝ—еҲ°еұҸе№•дёҠпјҢж–№дҫҝе®ҡдҪҚй”ҷиҜҜгҖӮ

    еҲӣе»ә Assets/ConsoleToScreen.cs и„ҡжң¬зұ»пјҢд»Јз ҒеҰӮдёӢпјҡ

    using System;
using System.Collections;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using UnityEngine;

public class ConsoleToScreen : MonoBehaviour
{
    const int maxLines = 50;
    const int maxLineLength = 120;
    private string _logStr = "";

    private readonly List<string> _lines = new List<string>();

    public int fontSize = 15;

    void OnEnable() { Application.logMessageReceived += Log; }
    void OnDisable() { Application.logMessageReceived -= Log; }

    public void Log(string logString, string stackTrace, LogType type)
    {
        foreach (var line in logString.Split('\n'))
        {
            if (line.Length <= maxLineLength)
            {
                _lines.Add(line);
                continue;
            }
            var lineCount = line.Length / maxLineLength + 1;
            for (int i = 0; i < lineCount; i++)
            {
                if ((i + 1) * maxLineLength <= line.Length)
                {
                    _lines.Add(line.Substring(i * maxLineLength, maxLineLength));
                }
                else
                {
                    _lines.Add(line.Substring(i * maxLineLength, line.Length - i * maxLineLength));
                }
            }
        }
        if (_lines.Count > maxLines)
        {
            _lines.RemoveRange(0, _lines.Count - maxLines);
        }
        _logStr = string.Join("\n", _lines);
    }

    void OnGUI()
    {
        GUI.matrix = Matrix4x4.TRS(Vector3.zero, Quaternion.identity,
           new Vector3(Screen.width / 1200.0f, Screen.height / 800.0f, 1.0f));
        GUI.Label(new Rect(10, 10, 800, 370), _logStr, new GUIStyle() { fontSize = Math.Max(10, fontSize) });
    }
}

    mainеңәжҷҜеҲӣе»әConsoleToScreenз©әеҜ№иұЎжҢӮдёҠConsoleToScreenи„ҡжң¬

    еҲӣе»ә HotUpdate зғӯжӣҙж–°жЁЎеқ—

    еҲӣе»ә Assets/HotUpdate зӣ®еҪ•пјҢеңЁзӣ®еҪ•дёӢ еҸій”® Create/Assembly DefinitionпјҢеҲӣе»әдёҖдёӘеҗҚдёәHotUpdateзҡ„зЁӢеәҸйӣҶжЁЎеқ—

    й…ҚзҪ®HybridCLR

    жү“ејҖиҸңеҚ• HybridCLR вҶ’ SettingsпјҢеңЁ Hot Update Assemblies дёӯж·»еҠ  HotUpdate зЁӢеәҸйӣҶпјҢеҰӮдёӢеӣҫпјҡ

    жү“ејҖPlayerSettingsпјҢиҝӣиЎҢй…ҚзҪ®


    HybridCLR еҢ…дҪҺдәҺ v4.0.0 ж—¶пјҢйңҖиҰҒе…ій—ӯ Use Incremental GCпјҲеўһйҮҸ GCпјүйҖүйЎ№
    Scripting Backend еҲҮжҚўдёә IL2CPP
    Api Compatibility Level еҲҮжҚўдёә .NET 4.xпјҲUnity 2019вҖ“2020пјүжҲ– .NET FrameworkпјҲUnity 2021+пјү

    еҲӣе»әзғӯжӣҙж–°и„ҡжң¬

    еҲӣе»ә Assets/HotUpdate/Hello.cs ж–Үд»¶

    using System.Collections;
using UnityEngine;

public class Hello
{
    public static void Run()
    {
        Debug.Log("Hello, HybridCLR");
    }
}

    еҠ иҪҪзғӯжӣҙж–°зЁӢеәҸйӣҶ

    еҲӣе»әAssets/LoadDll.csи„ҡжң¬пјҢз„¶еҗҺеңЁmainеңәжҷҜдёӯеҲӣе»әдёҖдёӘGameObjectеҜ№иұЎпјҢжҢӮиҪҪLoadDllи„ҡжң¬гҖӮ

    using System;
using System.Linq;
using System.Reflection;
using UnityEngine;
using YooAsset;


public class LoadDll : MonoBehaviour
{
    void Start()
    {
    #if !UNITY_EDITOR
        // жү“еҢ…еҗҺйқһзј–иҫ‘еҷЁжЁЎејҸдёӢ

        // еҺҹз”ҹHybridжЁЎжӢҹ
        // Assembly hotUpdateAss = Assembly.Load(File.ReadAllBytes($"{Application.streamingAssetsPath}/HotUpdate.dll.bytes"));

        // дҪҝз”ЁYooAsset 
        var package = YooAssets.GetPackage("DefaultPackage");

        //HotUpdate.dll.bytes
        AssetHandle handle = package.LoadAssetSync<TextAsset>
            ("Assets/AB/HotDll/HotUpdate.dll.bytes");
        TextAsset text = handle.AssetObject as TextAsset;
        Assembly hotUpdateAss = Assembly.Load(text.bytes);

    #else
        // зј–иҫ‘еҷЁжЁЎејҸдёӢ
        // EditorзҺҜеўғдёӢпјҢHotUpdate.dll.bytesе·Із»Ҹиў«иҮӘеҠЁеҠ иҪҪпјҢдёҚйңҖиҰҒеҠ иҪҪпјҢйҮҚеӨҚеҠ иҪҪеҸҚиҖҢдјҡеҮәй—®йўҳгҖӮ
        // EditorдёӢж— йңҖеҠ иҪҪпјҢзӣҙжҺҘжҹҘжүҫиҺ·еҫ—HotUpdateзЁӢеәҸйӣҶ
        Assembly hotUpdateAss =
            System.AppDomain.CurrentDomain.GetAssemblies().First(a => a.GetName().Name == "HotUpdate");
    #endif

        //еҫ—еҲ°Helloзұ»и°ғз”ЁеҮҪж•°
        Type type = hotUpdateAss.GetType("Hello");
        type.GetMethod("Run").Invoke(null, null);
    }
}

    жү“еҢ…з”ҹжҲҗHotUpdate.dll

    иҝҗиЎҢиҸңеҚ• HybridCLR вҶ’ Generate вҶ’ All еҒҡеҝ…иҰҒз”ҹжҲҗпјҢдёҚиҰҒжјҸиҝҷдёҖжӯҘгҖӮ

    е°Ҷ{proj}/HybridCLRData/HotUpdateDlls/StandaloneWindows64(MacOSдёӢдёәStandaloneMacXxx)зӣ®еҪ•дёӢзҡ„HotUpdate.dllеӨҚеҲ¶еҲ°Assets/AB/HotDll/HotUpdate.dll.bytesпјҢжіЁж„ҸпјҢиҰҒеҠ .bytesеҗҺзјҖпјҒпјҒпјҒиҝҷж ·жүҚиғҪиў«еҠ иҪҪпјҒ

    YooAssetиө„жәҗдёӯеҠ е…ҘHotUpdate.dll

    MyYooAssetTestзҡ„UpdateDoneеҮҪж•°дёӯпјҢеҸӘжү“ејҖеҠ иҪҪMainеңәжҷҜзҡ„д»Јз Ғ

    // еңәжҷҜеҠ иҪҪ
string scenePath = "Assets/AB/Scene/Main.unity"; //
var sceneMode = UnityEngine.SceneManagement.LoadSceneMode.Single;
var physicsMode = LocalPhysicsMode.None;
bool suspendLoad = false;
SceneHandle handle = _package.LoadSceneAsync(scenePath, sceneMode, physicsMode, suspendLoad);
await handle.Task;
Debug.Log("Scene name is " + handle.SceneName);

    жү“еҢ…иҝҗиЎҢ

    е…Ҳжү“дёҖж¬ЎABеҢ…пјҢж”ҫе…ҘVersionж–Үд»¶е’ҢBytesж–Үд»¶еҲ°StreamingAssets/yoo/DefaultPackageдёӢ

    з”ҹжҲҗзҡ„ABеҢ…ж”ҫеңЁжң¬ең°иө„жәҗжңҚеҠЎеҷЁпјҢеҗҜеҠЁжңҚеҠЎеҷЁ

    жү“ејҖBuild SettingsеҜ№иҜқжЎҶпјҢзӮ№еҮ»Build And RunпјҢжү“еҢ…е№¶дё”иҝҗиЎҢзғӯжӣҙж–°зӨәдҫӢе·ҘзЁӢгҖӮеҸҜд»ҘзңӢеҲ°Hello, HybridCLR

    жөӢиҜ•зғӯжӣҙж–°

    дҝ®ж”№Assets/HotUpdate/Hello.csзҡ„RunеҮҪж•°дёӯDebug.Log(вҖңHello, HybridCLRвҖқ);д»Јз ҒпјҢж”№жҲҗDebug.Log(вҖңHello, Linwentao!!!!!!вҖқ);

    public class Hello
{
    public static void Run()
    {
        Debug.Log("Hello, Linwentao!!!!!!");
    }
}

    иҝҗиЎҢиҸңеҚ• HybridCLR вҶ’ CompileDll вҶ’ ActiveBuildTarget йҮҚж–°зј–иҜ‘зғӯжӣҙж–°д»Јз ҒгҖӮ

    е°Ҷ{proj}/HybridCLRData/HotUpdateDlls/StandaloneWindows64(MacOSдёӢдёәStandaloneMacXxx)зӣ®еҪ•дёӢзҡ„HotUpdate.dllеӨҚеҲ¶жӣҝжҚўжҺүе·ҘзЁӢдёӯе·Із»ҸеӯҳеңЁзҡ„HotUpdate.dll.bytesпјҢд№ҹиҰҒеҠ дёҠеҗҺзјҖbytes

    жЈҖжҹҘYooAssetиө„жәҗеј•з”ЁжІЎжңүдёўеӨұпјҢйҮҚж–°з”ЁYooAssetжү“ABеҢ…пјҢе…ЁйғЁж”ҫеҲ°иө„жәҗжңҚеҠЎеҷЁдёҠ

    йҮҚж–°иҝҗиЎҢд№ӢеүҚжү“еҢ…еҘҪзҡ„PCеҢ…пјҢеҸ‘зҺ°жү“еҚ°иҜӯеҸҘеҸҳдәҶпјҢе®һзҺ°д»Јз Ғзғӯжӣҙж–°пјҒпјҒ

    8.2 зҹҘиҜҶзӮ№д»Јз Ғ

    ConsoleToScreen.cs

    using System;
using System.Collections;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using UnityEngine;

public class ConsoleToScreen : MonoBehaviour
{
    const int maxLines = 50;
    const int maxLineLength = 120;
    private string _logStr = "";

    private readonly List<string> _lines = new List<string>();

    public int fontSize = 15;

    void OnEnable()
    {
        Application.logMessageReceived += Log;
    }

    void OnDisable()
    {
        Application.logMessageReceived -= Log;
    }

    public void Log(string logString, string stackTrace, LogType type)
    {
        foreach (var line in logString.Split('\n'))
        {
            if (line.Length <= maxLineLength)
            {
                _lines.Add(line);
                continue;
            }

            var lineCount = line.Length / maxLineLength + 1;
            for (int i = 0; i < lineCount; i++)
            {
                if ((i + 1) * maxLineLength <= line.Length)
                {
                    _lines.Add(line.Substring(i * maxLineLength, maxLineLength));
                }
                else
                {
                    _lines.Add(line.Substring(i * maxLineLength, line.Length - i * maxLineLength));
                }
            }
        }

        if (_lines.Count > maxLines)
        {
            _lines.RemoveRange(0, _lines.Count - maxLines);
        }

        _logStr = string.Join("\n", _lines);
    }

    void OnGUI()
    {
        GUI.matrix = Matrix4x4.TRS(Vector3.zero, Quaternion.identity,
            new Vector3(Screen.width / 1200.0f, Screen.height / 800.0f, 1.0f));
        GUI.Label(new Rect(10, 10, 800, 370), _logStr, new GUIStyle() { fontSize = Math.Max(10, fontSize) });
    }
}

    LoadDll.cs

    using System;
using System.Linq;
using System.Reflection;
using UnityEngine;
using YooAsset;


public class LoadDll : MonoBehaviour
{
    void Start()
    {
    #if !UNITY_EDITOR
        // жү“еҢ…еҗҺйқһзј–иҫ‘еҷЁжЁЎејҸдёӢ

        // еҺҹз”ҹHybridжЁЎжӢҹ
        // Assembly hotUpdateAss = Assembly.Load(File.ReadAllBytes($"{Application.streamingAssetsPath}/HotUpdate.dll.bytes"));

        // дҪҝз”ЁYooAsset 
        var package = YooAssets.GetPackage("DefaultPackage");

        //HotUpdate.dll.bytes
        AssetHandle handle = package.LoadAssetSync<TextAsset>
            ("Assets/AB/HotDll/HotUpdate.dll.bytes");
        TextAsset text = handle.AssetObject as TextAsset;
        Assembly hotUpdateAss = Assembly.Load(text.bytes);

    #else
        // зј–иҫ‘еҷЁжЁЎејҸдёӢ
        // EditorзҺҜеўғдёӢпјҢHotUpdate.dll.bytesе·Із»Ҹиў«иҮӘеҠЁеҠ иҪҪпјҢдёҚйңҖиҰҒеҠ иҪҪпјҢйҮҚеӨҚеҠ иҪҪеҸҚиҖҢдјҡеҮәй—®йўҳгҖӮ
        // EditorдёӢж— йңҖеҠ иҪҪпјҢзӣҙжҺҘжҹҘжүҫиҺ·еҫ—HotUpdateзЁӢеәҸйӣҶ
        Assembly hotUpdateAss =
            System.AppDomain.CurrentDomain.GetAssemblies().First(a => a.GetName().Name == "HotUpdate");
    #endif

        //еҫ—еҲ°Helloзұ»и°ғз”ЁеҮҪж•°
        Type type = hotUpdateAss.GetType("Hello");
        type.GetMethod("Run").Invoke(null, null);
    }
}

    Hello.cs

    using System.Collections;
using UnityEngine;

public class Hello
{
    public static void Run()
    {
        Debug.Log("Hello, Linwentao!!!!!!");
    }
}

    MyYooAssetTest.cs

    using System;
using System.Collections;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using UnityEngine;
using UnityEngine.SceneManagement;
using UnityEngine.Serialization;
using YooAsset;

public class MyYooAssetTest : MonoBehaviour
{
    public EPlayMode playMode = EPlayMode.HostPlayMode; //иҝҗиЎҢжЁЎејҸ
    public string packageName = "DefaultPackage"; //й»ҳи®ӨеҢ…еҗҚ
    public string packageVersion = ""; //жңҚеҠЎеҷЁиө„жәҗзүҲжң¬еҸ·
    private ResourcePackage _package = null; //иө„жәҗеҢ…еҜ№иұЎ

    //зҪ‘з»ңзӣёе…і
    public string defaultHostServer = "http://127.0.0.1/CDN/PC/v1.0";
    public string fallbackHostServer = "http://127.0.0.1/CDN/PC/v1.0";

    //дёӢиҪҪзӣёе…і
    public int downloadingMaxNum = 10;
    public int failedTryAgain = 3;
    private ResourceDownloaderOperation _downloader;

    private void Awake()
    {
        DontDestroyOnLoad(gameObject);
    }


    IEnumerator Start()
    {
        yield return null;

        //1.еҲқе§ӢеҢ–YooAsset
        YooAssets.Initialize();

        // иҺ·еҸ–жҲ–еҲӣе»әиө„жәҗеҢ…еҜ№иұЎ
        _package = YooAssets.TryGetPackage(packageName);
        if (_package == null)
        {
            _package = YooAssets.CreatePackage(packageName);
        }

        // еҲӣе»әиҝңз«ҜжңҚеҠЎе®һдҫӢпјҢз”ЁдәҺиө„жәҗиҜ·жұӮ
        IRemoteServices remoteServices = new RemoteServices(defaultHostServer, fallbackHostServer);

        // еҲӣе»әиҒ”жңәжЁЎејҸеҸӮж•°пјҢе№¶и®ҫзҪ®еҶ…зҪ®еҸҠзј“еӯҳж–Үд»¶зі»з»ҹеҸӮж•°
        HostPlayModeParameters createParameters = new HostPlayModeParameters
        {
            //еҲӣе»әеҶ…зҪ®ж–Үд»¶зі»з»ҹеҸӮж•°
            BuildinFileSystemParameters = FileSystemParameters.CreateDefaultBuildinFileSystemParameters(),
            //еҲӣе»әзј“еӯҳзі»з»ҹеҸӮж•°
            CacheFileSystemParameters = FileSystemParameters.CreateDefaultCacheFileSystemParameters(remoteServices, new FileOffsetDecryption())
        };

        //жү§иЎҢејӮжӯҘеҲқе§ӢеҢ–
        InitializationOperation initializationOperation =
            _package.InitializeAsync(createParameters);
        yield return initializationOperation;

        // еӨ„зҗҶеҲқе§ӢеҢ–з»“жһң
        if (initializationOperation.Status != EOperationStatus.Succeed)
        {
            Debug.LogWarning(initializationOperation.Error);
        }
        else
        {
            Debug.Log("еҲқе§ӢеҢ–жҲҗеҠҹ-------------------------");
        }


        //2.иҺ·еҸ–иө„жәҗзүҲжң¬
        // еҸ‘иө·ејӮжӯҘзүҲжң¬иҜ·жұӮ
        RequestPackageVersionOperation operation = _package.RequestPackageVersionAsync();
        yield return operation;

        // еӨ„зҗҶзүҲжң¬иҜ·жұӮз»“жһң
        if (operation.Status != EOperationStatus.Succeed)
        {
            Debug.LogWarning(operation.Error);
        }
        else
        {
            Debug.Log($"иҜ·жұӮзҡ„зүҲжң¬: {operation.PackageVersion}");
            packageVersion = operation.PackageVersion;
        }


        //3.иҺ·еҸ–ж–Үд»¶жё…еҚ•
        UpdatePackageManifestOperation operationManifest = _package.UpdatePackageManifestAsync(packageVersion);
        yield return operationManifest;

        // еӨ„зҗҶж–Үд»¶жё…еҚ•з»“жһң
        if (operationManifest.Status != EOperationStatus.Succeed)
        {
            Debug.LogWarning(operationManifest.Error);
        }
        else
        {
            Debug.Log("жӣҙж–°иө„жәҗжё…еҚ•жҲҗеҠҹ-------------------");
        }


        //4.еҲӣе»әдёӢиҪҪеҷЁ
        _downloader = _package.CreateResourceDownloader(downloadingMaxNum, failedTryAgain);
        if (_downloader.TotalDownloadCount == 0)
        {
            Debug.Log("жІЎжңүйңҖиҰҒжӣҙж–°зҡ„ж–Үд»¶");
            UpdateDone();
            StartCoroutine(UpdateDoneCoroutine());
            yield break;
        }
        else
        {
            int count = _downloader.TotalDownloadCount;
            long bytes = _downloader.TotalDownloadBytes;
            Debug.Log($"йңҖиҰҒжӣҙж–°{count}дёӘж–Үд»¶, еӨ§е°ҸжҳҜ{bytes / 1024 / 1024}MB");
        }


        //5.ејҖе§ӢдёӢиҪҪ
        _downloader.DownloadErrorCallback = DownloadErrorCallback; // еҚ•дёӘж–Үд»¶дёӢиҪҪеӨұиҙҘ
        _downloader.DownloadUpdateCallback = DownloadUpdateCallback; // дёӢиҪҪиҝӣеәҰжӣҙж–°
        _downloader.BeginDownload(); //ејҖе§ӢдёӢиҪҪ
        yield return _downloader;


        if (_downloader.Status != EOperationStatus.Succeed)
        {
            Debug.LogWarning(_downloader.Error);
            yield break;
        }
        else
        {
            Debug.Log("дёӢиҪҪжҲҗеҠҹ-------------------");
        }


        //6.жё…зҗҶж–Үд»¶
        // жё…зҗҶжңӘдҪҝз”Ёзҡ„ж–Үд»¶
        var operationClear = _package.ClearCacheFilesAsync(EFileClearMode.ClearUnusedBundleFiles);
        // ж·»еҠ жё…зҗҶе®ҢжҲҗеӣһи°ғ
        operationClear.Completed += Operation_Completed;
    }


    //зғӯжӣҙж–°з»“жқҹ
    private async void UpdateDone()
    {
        Debug.Log("зғӯжӣҙж–°з»“жқҹ");

        //и·іиҪ¬еңәжҷҜ

        //жЁЎжӢҹиө„жәҗеҠ иҪҪ
        // Sprite car = _package.LoadAssetSync<Sprite>("Assets/AB/Image/жұҪиҪҰ.png")
        //     .AssetObject as Sprite;
        // // Sprite car = _package.LoadAssetSync<Sprite>("Assets/AB/Image/жұҪиҪҰ")
        // //     .AssetObject as Sprite;//еҗҺзјҖеҗҚеҸҜд»ҘзңҒз•Ҙ
        // GameObject go = new GameObject();
        // go.AddComponent<SpriteRenderer>().sprite = car;


        //ејӮжӯҘе§”жүҳиө„жәҗеҠ иҪҪ
        // AssetHandle handle = _package.LoadAssetAsync<Sprite>("Assets/AB/Image/жұҪиҪҰ");
        // handle.Completed += Handle_Completed;


        // taskеҠ иҪҪиө„жәҗ
        // AssetHandle handle = _package.LoadAssetAsync<Sprite>("Assets/AB/Image/жұҪиҪҰ");
        // await handle.Task;
        //
        // Sprite car = handle.AssetObject as Sprite;
        // GameObject go = new GameObject();
        // go.AddComponent<SpriteRenderer>().sprite = car;


        //иҺ·еҸ–жүҖжңүдҝЎжҒҜ
        // AssetInfo[] assetInfos = package.GetAssetInfos("hot");
        // foreach (var assetInfo in assetInfos)
        // {
        //     Debug.Log(assetInfo.AssetPath);
        // }

        // еңәжҷҜеҠ иҪҪ
        string scenePath = "Assets/AB/Scene/Main.unity"; //
        var sceneMode = UnityEngine.SceneManagement.LoadSceneMode.Single;
        var physicsMode = LocalPhysicsMode.None;
        bool suspendLoad = false;
        SceneHandle handle = _package.LoadSceneAsync(scenePath, sceneMode, physicsMode, suspendLoad);
        await handle.Task;
        Debug.Log("Scene name is " + handle.SceneName);


        //йў„еҲ¶дҪ“еҠ иҪҪе’ҢеҲӣе»ә
        // AssetHandle handle = _package.LoadAssetAsync<GameObject>
        //     ("Assets/AB/Prefab/Car.prefab");
        // await handle.Task;
        // GameObject go1 = Instantiate(handle.AssetObject as GameObject);
        // Debug.Log("Prefab go1 name:" + go1.name);
        // GameObject go2 = handle.InstantiateSync();
        // Debug.Log("Prefab go2 name:" + go2.name);


        //еӣҫзүҮеӯҗеҜ№иұЎеҠ иҪҪ
        // SubAssetsHandle handle =
        //     _package.LoadSubAssetsAsync<Sprite>("Assets/AB/Image/Farms");
        // await handle.Task;
        // var sprite = handle.GetSubAssetObject<Sprite>("hen");
        // new GameObject().AddComponent<SpriteRenderer>().sprite = sprite;
        // Debug.Log("Sprite name: " + sprite.name);


        //еҚёиҪҪжңӘдҪҝз”Ёзҡ„иө„жәҗеҢ…
        // var operation = package.UnloadUnusedAssetsAsync();
        // await operation.Task;

        //ејәеҲ¶еҚёиҪҪиө„жәҗеҢ…
        // var operation = package.UnloadAllAssetsAsync();
        // await operation.Task;


        //еҚёиҪҪиө„жәҗеҢ…дёӯжҹҗдёӘиө„жәҗ (иҰҒжңӘиў«еј•з”Ёзҡ„пјҢеҗҰеҲҷж— ж•Ҳ)
        // package.TryUnloadUnusedAsset("Assets/GameRes/Panel/login.prefab");
        //
    }

    //зғӯжӣҙж–°з»“жқҹеҚҸзЁӢ
    IEnumerator UpdateDoneCoroutine()
    {
        yield return null;
        // еҚҸзЁӢж–№ејҸеҠ иҪҪиө„жәҗ
        // AssetHandle handle = _package.LoadAssetAsync<Sprite>("Assets/AB/Image/жұҪиҪҰ");
        // yield return handle;
        // Sprite car = handle.AssetObject as Sprite;
        // GameObject go = new GameObject();
        // go.AddComponent<SpriteRenderer>().sprite = car;
    }

    // еҚ•дёӘж–Үд»¶дёӢиҪҪеӨұиҙҘ
    public static void DownloadErrorCallback(DownloadErrorData errorData)
    {
        string fileName = errorData.FileName;
        string errorInfo = errorData.ErrorInfo;
        Debug.Log($"дёӢиҪҪеӨұиҙҘ, ж–Үд»¶еҗҚ: {fileName}, й”ҷиҜҜдҝЎжҒҜ: {errorInfo}");
    }

    // дёӢиҪҪиҝӣеәҰжӣҙж–°
    public static void DownloadUpdateCallback(DownloadUpdateData updateData)
    {
        int totalDownloadCount = updateData.TotalDownloadCount;
        int currentDownloadCount = updateData.CurrentDownloadCount;
        long totalDownloadSizeBytes = updateData.TotalDownloadBytes;
        long currentDownloadSizeBytes = updateData.CurrentDownloadBytes;
        Debug.Log($"дёӢиҪҪиҝӣеәҰ: {currentDownloadCount}/{totalDownloadCount}, " +
                  $"{currentDownloadSizeBytes / 1024}KB/{totalDownloadSizeBytes / 1024}KB");
    }

    //ж–Үд»¶жё…зҗҶе®ҢжҲҗ
    private void Operation_Completed(AsyncOperationBase obj)
    {
        UpdateDone();
        StartCoroutine(UpdateDoneCoroutine());
    }


    // ејӮжӯҘе§”жүҳеӣһи°ғ
    private void Handle_Completed(AssetHandle handle)
    {
        Sprite car = handle.AssetObject as Sprite;
        GameObject go = new GameObject();
        go.AddComponent<SpriteRenderer>().sprite = car;
    }
}
    иҪ¬иҪҪиҜ·жіЁжҳҺжқҘжәҗпјҢж¬ўиҝҺеҜ№ж–Үз« дёӯзҡ„еј•з”ЁжқҘжәҗиҝӣиЎҢиҖғиҜҒпјҢж¬ўиҝҺжҢҮеҮәд»»дҪ•жңүй”ҷиҜҜжҲ–дёҚеӨҹжё…жҷ°зҡ„иЎЁиҫҫгҖӮеҸҜд»ҘеңЁдёӢйқўиҜ„и®әеҢәиҜ„и®әпјҢд№ҹеҸҜд»ҘйӮ®д»¶иҮі 785293209@qq.com
